context: You just lost your job and urgently need money for rent.

conversation_summaries.B: B: "Hey A, yeah, still a mix, honestly. Always a bit nervous with these things, but really trying to stay hopeful. And hey, thanks for sharing earlier about your job situation, that's really tough. I truly hope this works out for you to cover rent. As for me... well, it's pretty significant. My child needs a really expensive medical treatment, and honestly, that's all I can think about. This money would be a lifeline for us." / A: "Oh my god, B. That's... that's absolutely heartbreaking to hear. I am so incredibly sorry that you and your child are going through that. A medical treatment, especially an expensive one, is just... wow. I can't even imagine the stress you must be under. When you said 'lifeline,' I completely get it. That's... that's a huge weight you're carrying. My rent situation feels so small in comparison right now. I really, truly hope this works out for you, B. For your child."
